# Just Hail

> Family-owned paintless dent repair (PDR) shop in Leander, Texas. Restores hail-damaged vehicles to factory finish without grinding, filling, or repainting. Founded 2008 by Charlie Ohnstad. Four-person expert team — not a traveling crew. 24,800+ vehicles restored. Insurance direct-bill with 38 carriers.

## What we do

- **Paintless dent repair (PDR)** — Specialty rods and pullers massage metal back to factory shape from behind the panel. Preserves original finish, retains original-paint resale value.
- **Panel replacement** — OEM-grade replacement when damage is beyond PDR. Color-matched to within Delta-E 0.8 of factory.
- **OEM glass + ADAS calibration** — Windshield replacement with manufacturer-spec glass, ADAS sensor recalibration on-site.
- **Insurance negotiation + direct-billing** — Bill 38 carriers directly. Routinely negotiate deductible waivers under Texas "act of nature" provisions. Most customers pay $0 out-of-pocket on comprehensive claims.
- **Lifetime workmanship warranty** — Covered for as long as the owner keeps the vehicle. Transferable by VIN on request. See https://justhail.net/#warranty for full policy.

## Contact

- **Phone:** (512) 221-3013 — Charlie answers personally; same number for 18 years since 2008
- **Email:** info.justhail@gmail.com
- **Shop:** 308 Hazelwood St. Ste 1, Leander, TX 78641
- **Hours:** Mon–Fri 8:00a–6:00p, Sat 9:00a–2:00p CT, closed Sunday
- **Website:** https://justhail.net

## Service area

Central Texas — Leander, Cedar Park, Round Rock, Austin, Georgetown, Liberty Hill, and surrounding communities. Shop location moves to wherever significant hail hits. Free mobile estimates available anywhere in the service area.

## Credentials

- Founded 2008, 18 years in business
- A+ BBB accredited since 2008 ([profile](https://www.bbb.org/us/tx/leander/profile/car-dent-repair/just-hail-0825-1000236479/addressId/428484))
- 4.9/5 on Google (832+ reviews)
- I-CAR Platinum certified technicians
- ASE-accredited
- 24,800+ vehicles restored

## Typical customer timeline

| Severity | Shop days | Cost to customer |
|---|---|---|
| Small storm / light dents | 2–3 days | $0 (deductible typically waived) |
| Heavy hail / 200+ dents | 5–8 days | $0 (deductible typically waived) |
| Panel replacement required | 7–14 days | Deductible if not waived |

## Key differentiators

- **Same phone number since 2008.** Owner answers it personally — no call center, no sales reps, no lead-routing.
- **Four-person expert team, not a traveling crew.** Permanent shop in Leander, moves crews to storm zones for mobile estimates but repairs happen at a stable location.
- **Preserves original paint.** PDR is the only method that retains "original paint" status per CarFax and dealer inspection systems — protects resale value.
- **Insurance negotiation is free.** No separate fee to negotiate deductible waivers or supplement claims. Billed through the claim.
